hooks.command: if [ -n "$CLAUDE_ENV_FILE" ]; then for var in TASK_LIVE_LOG BASH_DEFAULT_TIMEOUT_MS BASH_MAX_TIMEOUT_MS; do eval val=\$$var; if [ -n "$val" ]; then echo "export $var=\"$val\"" >> "$CLAUDE_ENV_FILE"; fi; done; fi; exit 0
jq -e '(.tool_input.run_in_background // false) | not' > /dev/null || (echo 'Do not run commands in background. Run them synchronously so output can be monitored.' >&2; exit 2)
jq -e '(.tool_input.run_in_background // false) | not' > /dev/null || (echo 'Reminder: do NOT write TASK_RESULT until all background agents have completed.' >&2; exit 0)
